title: Maltorian Mining Belt

{{Quote|The situation in the Maltorian mining belt is deteriorating as well. Without Zekk there to lead the hunt, Three-Eye's pirates have the run of the system. Raw material shipments have fallen by fifty percent, and RePlanetHab is trying to buy them off.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="TJK" />}}
The '''Maltorian Mining Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] that was located in the [[Maltoria system]],<ref name="TJK" /> a part of the [[Lifh sector/Legends|Lifh sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Region" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was located near [[Maltoria]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|282|Maltorian Mining Belt}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|The way I heard it, the fighting was over by the time we arrived. Three-Eye was actually handed over to us by a pair of Jedi Knights.|[[Lon Shevu]], to [[Ben Skywalker]]|<ref name="Invincible">''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''</ref>}}
The Maltorian Mining Belt was part of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. [[Three-Eye]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] took charge of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], trying to force [[RePlanetHab]] to give them a enormous bribe. The massive conglomerate was ready to pay the pirates off, until the Galactic Alliance and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] intervened.<ref name="TJK" />

{{Ast-stub}}
